content: Phase 1: Build test_core.py proving ALL real open APIs + scoring engine + convergence log + Claude interpretation
Phase 1: Fix until test_core.py passes end-to-end (12/12 PASSED twice, real data, no mock)
Phase 2: design_agent guidelines for PropSignal v2 UI (forward user's explicit light-premium spec)
Phase 2: Backend — auth (JWT), MongoDB models, scoring module, API clients, ingestion engine, all routes
Phase 2: Frontend — reproduce reference UI (3-col, MapLibre cadastre tiles, heatmap, markers, intelligence drawer, convergence log), all pages
Phase 2: End-to-end testing via testing_agent_v3 (all user stories)
Phase 3: Polish, production hardening, additional features
